nasb.text: “After forty years had passed, an angel appeared to him in the wilderness of Mount Sinai, in the flame of a burning thorn bush.

esv.text: “Now when forty years had passed, an angel appeared to him in the wilderness of Mount Sinai, in a flame of fire in a bush.

cnv.text: “過了四十年，在西奈山的曠野，有一位使者，在荊棘中的火燄裡，向摩西顯現。

ccb.text: “过了四十年，在西奈山的旷野，上帝的天使在荆棘火焰中向摩西显现。

csbs.text: 过了四十年，在西奈山的旷野，一位天使在荆棘火焰中向摩西显现。
